reasoning: The Lean statement matches the informal statement in all components. `ContDiff ℝ 3 f` correctly encodes "continuous third derivative" (since a continuous third derivative implies continuity of all lower-order derivatives). The hypothesis `∀ n ≤ 3, ∀ x, iteratedDeriv n f x > 0` captures that f(x), f'(x), f''(x), f'''(x) are all positive (using that iteratedDeriv 0 f = f). The hypothesis `iteratedDeriv 3 f x ≤ f x` matches f'''(x) ≤ f(x). The conclusion `deriv f x < 2 * f x` matches f'(x) < 2 f(x). The quantifier structure (universal over x) is preserved throughout.
